title: mirror perf-report into runtime+distribution, bump 1.3.3, manifest, self-onboard, full verify
action: Release 1.3.3 with the perf-report increment. (1) Mirror changed templates byte-identical into .bee/bin (bee.mjs, lib/perf.mjs, lib/command-registry.mjs) and the vendored hook .bee/bin/hooks/bee-session-close.mjs, and into both distribution trees .claude/skills/bee-hive + .agents/skills/bee-hive (templates/bee.mjs, templates/lib/perf.mjs, templates/lib/command-registry.mjs, templates/tests/test_perf.mjs, templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs). (2) Bump version 1.3.2->1.3.3 in the 4-tuple (skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/state.mjs:11, .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs:11, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, .codex-plugin/plugin.json) + split-brain anchors (skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs :201,:206,:224) + the committed projection copies (.claude/.agents state.mjs + test_split_brain_regression.mjs). (3) node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write. (4) self-onboard: node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root <root> --json --apply (updates .bee/onboarding.json bee_version+hashes). (5) Run the full recorded verify green (tuple, lib-mirror, split-brain, manifest --check, all suites). Record full output as cap evidence.

truths: All mirrors byte-identical (test_lib_mirror + hook inventory green).
4-tuple + split-brain anchors + projections all read 1.3.3 (test_release_tuple + test_split_brain_regression green).
prohibitions: Cap requires the FULL verify output as evidence.

verify: node scripts/test_release_tuple.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_split_brain_regression.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_perf.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs
